introduction: SYNOPSISHi-ryun dreams of becoming a singer. By chance, she meets Min-ho, her friend's older brother. Min-ho is a singer and Hi-ryun gets the chance to sing on stage due to him. The response to her is unexpectedly good and Hi-ryun gets a shot of making it but she loses her opportunity because of the drunk, pot-smoking behavior of Min-ho. Now married, Min-ho leaves his wife Hi-ryun so she can succeed. Hi-ryun gives birth to their baby. After overcoming great hardships, Hi-ryun makes it to the top. Min-ho hears the good news on television. Seeing Hi-ryung and their daughter Kyung-ah, Min-ho wants to see them so he heads to Seoul. On his way, he gets into a car accident and dies. As Hi-ryun throws Min-ho's ashes into the river with her daughter Kyung-ah, endless tears run down her face.故事试图成为歌手的Sookyun不小心遇到了朋友的兄弟Minho，并在舞台上唱歌。Minho为了妻子的努力成功离开了家。生下宝宝的勤奋成为歌手，成为歌手。Minho在电视上听这个好消息，看到Sookryeon和她的女儿Jaeah。他和他的女儿庆一把明赫的骨头放在河里流下了眼泪。
